baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, duplicate readiness loads
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs timing buildWorkspaceReadiness with internal docs, quests, reports, and repo-snapshot loads after the caller already had those surfaces available

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, reused readiness surfaces
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs timing buildWorkspaceReadiness with caller-provided docs, quests, reports, and repo snapshot from the surrounding context-pack assembly path

environment.note: The reused path assumes those surfaces were already loaded earlier in buildContextPack, so the benchmark isolates the duplicate-read cost removed from readiness scoring.
